rag_rules: Match the annex owner to the block scope: type-level contract content stays on the component type, while implementation-level bindings stay on the implementation.
When inserting implementation-scoped content, place it after the declarations it depends on so referenced subcomponents or connections already exist.
generic_rules: Fuse by adding the generated annex block without changing unrelated features, subcomponents, connections, or properties.
Preserve the generated block text during fusion; make only the minimal structural edits needed to attach or merge the block.
If the destination already contains annex content, merge conservatively and keep existing non-target text intact.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE content is wrapped as an AADL annex block using annex agree {** ... **};
anti_patterns: Do not attach implementation-only content to a type owner.
Do not insert a block into a scope where its referenced declarations are not yet defined.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
